productDisplayName: Fila Men Terra Navy Blue Slippers
description: A perfect blend of comfort and style, the fila Terra flip flops come with velvetty straps and a soft, perforated and cushioned footbed, that will never make you want to slide out of them.UpperSoft velvetty straps with a fabric twill inner lining and a toe separator to lock the foot in place and offer abrasion-free comfortCushioned and perforated PU footbed, with brand name printed on the heel regionCurved footbed for ergonomic comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with brand name styled lugs for absolute grip and tractionSlipper careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
